runner_hardening.auto_mode_behavior: dry-run uses snapshot fallback when rate-limited; mutating apply mode fails live instead of silently degrading

live_observation.reason: GitHub GraphQL API rate limit exceeded during repeated project item listing on 2026-03-10

decisions: issue documents are cached in-process so reconcile, selection, and dependency checks reuse the same issue payload
project item snapshots are refreshed on successful live reads and can be reused only when fallback policy allows it
auto fallback is disabled for mutating apply mode to avoid hiding stale GitHub data during state-changing runs

follow_up_candidates.title: rate-limit aware loop reporting and backoff guidance
follow_up_candidates.reason: the runner now has snapshot fallback but still surfaces raw API errors; the next step is a clearer operator-facing rate-limit report and cooldown guidance
